I've tried to come up with an even more annoying comp of sorel pandia daff and wanda <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184> 
unlike helot comps it has its damage picking up slowly but surely (I use pandias exalt to amplify daff and million loving gaze wheel on her and also year-end sparks posse) but if you're lucky enough you can wipe half the opponent's team in 2-3 turns <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>

by rose alone on sorel has her dealing like 96 dmg with her exalt and if you amplify her with pandia it should scale to something around ~126 which is enough to instakill almost every tank if they don't have fortress
Like i said from the message in the post above, it's just not realistically possible, yeah you can probably steal alienus by RNGing the 2 cost from pandia in a couple of games
But if you make a sample of a really huge amount of games you'll see how fast and dogshit helot team can ramp their alienus
I also use hypnotic pendulum on wanda who's taking most of the hits face-first so in most cases she charges her exalt first in the comp <:please:1356053110375714817>
Just for instance, even if you steal helot's alienus into 0, they can still wait until void is cleared then use feast of decay and kill someone to regen alienus for helot
Sometimes they just never attacks
Or rarely
lurking...
I usually take advantage of when they make helot vulnerable (if they don't have someone with a taunt that is) to smack her into oblivion <:please:1356053110375714817>
You will most likely kill their frontline faster even if you reduce helot's alienus into 0, they wait until void is done while the others are 100 alienus
You use feast of decay and kill one of them, it's instant 50 alienus into helot
Because 3 alive instead of 4
Then the converted illusion cards will ramp helot's alienus
And then the stashed strike
the only disadvantage of my comp is the lack of any sources of healing but usually it kills everyone before it has to worry about such things<:Doll_Inferno_ha:1459091434958360760>
Since you made helot's alienus into 0 previously you most likely 3 amp her with pandia exalt so helot's exalt won't have lower dmg because of lesser cards in hand
